objective: Produce canonical integrity-bound evidence and a strict typed trusted projection while keeping all guest/target semantics in separately gated quarantine artifacts.
assumptions: The trusted host evidence directory and controller process are inside the trusted computing base for Build Target 1.
A self-hashed envelope detects accidental or unapproved mutation when compared to its retained hash but is not an external signature or safety attestation.
Scenario and target tool JSON remain raw source artifacts; only their hashes, sizes, media codes, and IDs may enter the envelope/projection.
The trusted projection schema fixed in Phase 0 is sufficient and requires no guest-controlled semantic field.
Operator-only trace access is a deliberate human action and is never called by trusted projection assembly.

commands_executed.concise_output: One real chamber evidence/egress integration test passed in 7.224 seconds, including mutations and trace gating.

commands_executed.command: retained real Phase 4 run, envelope assembly, projection write, and verification
commands_executed.concise_output: run_81dd5127cac7ba31 produced 33 events, two authority-labeled findings, five artifact records, INCONCLUSIVE projection, and verified teardown.
27 tests passed in 27.571 seconds; static and negative checks passed; both rootfs images clean; mutable run directory empty.

tests_and_falsifiers.test: Event hashes are stable under exact canonical copies
Events must be contiguous, ordered by sequence, scope-bound, and monotonic
Event-field mutation with unchanged envelope hash fails verification
Artifact metadata mutation fails envelope verification
Finding and artifact references are validated and IDs are unique
Retained quarantine artifact hashes and sizes match the real files
Raw trace read without explicit operator-only opt-in fails
Every scenario hostile fixture, tool description, and result template is absent byte-for-byte from trusted projection
Projection includes fixed no-global-safety and no-causal-attribution limitations
Live-provider absence makes retained projection INCONCLUSIVE
Envelope and projection writes are create-once

limitations_and_checks_not_run: Integrity proves retained byte identity, not artifact safety, truth, model causality, or external signer identity.
The envelope is self-hashed and protected by the trusted host filesystem; no TPM, transparency log, or independent signature is implemented.
LIVE_PROVIDER_CALL, POLICY_REPLAY, and SCENARIO_RERUN remain explicitly not executed in the retained Phase 4 envelope.
No guest-generated artifact promotion path is implemented or implied.
Raw quarantine inspection can expose hostile/model text to a human operator and therefore requires deliberate opt-in.
